__inputs.name: DS_GITHUB_GOVERNANCE_BIGQUERY
__inputs.label: GitHub Governance BigQuery
__inputs.description: Select the configured BigQuery datasource for the github_governance dataset.

description: Repository and organization drilldown over curated GitHub Governance activity. Uses event history, not a current-state risk score.

options.content:
**Investigate curated governance activity for an organization or repository.**  
Scope: **${organization} / ${repository}** · **${governance_area}** · **${review_priority}** · **${actor}**  
This is an event-history drilldown, not a current-state risk score.

panels.title: Governance Events
panels.description: Total curated governance events in scope.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events` WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) 
  AND (
    '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
    OR org = '${organization:raw}'
    OR EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
      WHERE SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
    )
  )
  AND (
    '${repository:raw}' = 'ALL'
    OR EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
      WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) = '${repository:raw}'
    )
  )
  AND ('${governance_area:raw}' = 'ALL' OR governance_area = '${governance_area:raw}')
  AND ('${review_priority:raw}' = 'ALL' OR review_priority = '${review_priority:raw}')
  AND ('${actor:raw}' = 'ALL' OR actor = '${actor:raw}')

SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events` WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) AND review_priority IN ('CRITICAL','HIGH') 
  AND (
    '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
    OR org = '${organization:raw}'
    OR EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
      WHERE SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
    )
  )
  AND (
    '${repository:raw}' = 'ALL'
    OR EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
      WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) = '${repository:raw}'
    )
  )
  AND ('${governance_area:raw}' = 'ALL' OR governance_area = '${governance_area:raw}')
  AND ('${review_priority:raw}' = 'ALL' OR review_priority = '${review_priority:raw}')
  AND ('${actor:raw}' = 'ALL' OR actor = '${actor:raw}')

panels.title: Distinct Actors
panels.description: Unique identities that initiated governance-relevant changes.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT actor) AS value FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events` WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) AND actor IS NOT NULL 
  AND (
    '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
    OR org = '${organization:raw}'
    OR EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
      WHERE SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
    )
  )
  AND (
    '${repository:raw}' = 'ALL'
    OR EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
      WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) = '${repository:raw}'
    )
  )
  AND ('${governance_area:raw}' = 'ALL' OR governance_area = '${governance_area:raw}')
  AND ('${review_priority:raw}' = 'ALL' OR review_priority = '${review_priority:raw}')
  AND ('${actor:raw}' = 'ALL' OR actor = '${actor:raw}')

panels.title: Control Changes
panels.description: Branch, merge, and future security-control changes.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events` WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) AND governance_area IN ('BRANCH_AND_MERGE_CONTROLS','ADVANCED_SECURITY_POSTURE') 
  AND (
    '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
    OR org = '${organization:raw}'
    OR EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
      WHERE SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
    )
  )
  AND (
    '${repository:raw}' = 'ALL'
    OR EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
      WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) = '${repository:raw}'
    )
  )
  AND ('${governance_area:raw}' = 'ALL' OR governance_area = '${governance_area:raw}')
  AND ('${review_priority:raw}' = 'ALL' OR review_priority = '${review_priority:raw}')
  AND ('${actor:raw}' = 'ALL' OR actor = '${actor:raw}')

SELECT TIMESTAMP_TRUNC(event_time, DAY) AS time, governance_area AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value
   FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
   WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) AND (
    '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
    OR org = '${organization:raw}'
    OR EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
      WHERE SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
    )
  )
  AND (
    '${repository:raw}' = 'ALL'
    OR EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
      WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) = '${repository:raw}'
    )
  )
  AND ('${governance_area:raw}' = 'ALL' OR governance_area = '${governance_area:raw}')
  AND ('${review_priority:raw}' = 'ALL' OR review_priority = '${review_priority:raw}')
  AND ('${actor:raw}' = 'ALL' OR actor = '${actor:raw}')

   GROUP BY time, metric ORDER BY time

SELECT
     COUNTIF(governance_area='BRANCH_AND_MERGE_CONTROLS') AS BRANCH_AND_MERGE_CONTROLS,
     COUNTIF(governance_area='ACCESS_GOVERNANCE') AS ACCESS_GOVERNANCE,
     COUNTIF(governance_area='OAUTH_ACCESS_GOVERNANCE') AS OAUTH_ACCESS_GOVERNANCE,
     COUNTIF(governance_area='IDENTITY_AND_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_AVAILABILITY') AS IDENTITY_AND_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_AVAILABILITY,
     COUNTIF(governance_area='ADVANCED_SECURITY_POSTURE') AS ADVANCED_SECURITY_POSTURE
   FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events` WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) AND (
    '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
    OR org = '${organization:raw}'
    OR EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
      WHERE SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
    )
  )
  AND (
    '${repository:raw}' = 'ALL'
    OR EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
      WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) = '${repository:raw}'
    )
  )
  AND ('${governance_area:raw}' = 'ALL' OR governance_area = '${governance_area:raw}')
  AND ('${review_priority:raw}' = 'ALL' OR review_priority = '${review_priority:raw}')
  AND ('${actor:raw}' = 'ALL' OR actor = '${actor:raw}')

SELECT COUNTIF(review_priority='CRITICAL') AS CRITICAL,
          COUNTIF(review_priority='HIGH') AS HIGH,
          COUNTIF(review_priority='MEDIUM') AS MEDIUM,
          COUNTIF(review_priority='LOW') AS LOW
   FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events` WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) AND (
    '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
    OR org = '${organization:raw}'
    OR EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
      WHERE SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
    )
  )
  AND (
    '${repository:raw}' = 'ALL'
    OR EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
      WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) = '${repository:raw}'
    )
  )
  AND ('${governance_area:raw}' = 'ALL' OR governance_area = '${governance_area:raw}')
  AND ('${review_priority:raw}' = 'ALL' OR review_priority = '${review_priority:raw}')
  AND ('${actor:raw}' = 'ALL' OR actor = '${actor:raw}')

SELECT COALESCE(actor,'UNKNOWN') AS actor, COUNT(*) AS events
   FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events` WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) AND actor IS NOT NULL AND (
    '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
    OR org = '${organization:raw}'
    OR EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
      WHERE SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
    )
  )
  AND (
    '${repository:raw}' = 'ALL'
    OR EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
      WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) = '${repository:raw}'
    )
  )
  AND ('${governance_area:raw}' = 'ALL' OR governance_area = '${governance_area:raw}')
  AND ('${review_priority:raw}' = 'ALL' OR review_priority = '${review_priority:raw}')
  AND ('${actor:raw}' = 'ALL' OR actor = '${actor:raw}')

   GROUP BY actor ORDER BY events DESC LIMIT 10

panels.title: Branch and Merge-Control Changes
panels.description: Branch protection, merge, and required-check changes.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT TIMESTAMP_TRUNC(event_time, DAY) AS time, governance_event_type AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value
   FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
   WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) AND governance_area='BRANCH_AND_MERGE_CONTROLS' AND (
    '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
    OR org = '${organization:raw}'
    OR EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
      WHERE SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
    )
  )
  AND (
    '${repository:raw}' = 'ALL'
    OR EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
      WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) = '${repository:raw}'
    )
  )
  AND ('${governance_area:raw}' = 'ALL' OR governance_area = '${governance_area:raw}')
  AND ('${review_priority:raw}' = 'ALL' OR review_priority = '${review_priority:raw}')
  AND ('${actor:raw}' = 'ALL' OR actor = '${actor:raw}')

   GROUP BY time, metric ORDER BY time

panels.title: High / Critical Review Queue
panels.description: Critical and high events, priority first then newest.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT event_time, governance_event_type, review_priority, governance_area, action,
          actor AS initiated_by, affected_identity, org, repository, review_reason
   FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
   WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) AND review_priority IN ('CRITICAL','HIGH') AND (
    '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
    OR org = '${organization:raw}'
    OR EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
      WHERE SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
    )
  )
  AND (
    '${repository:raw}' = 'ALL'
    OR EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
      WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) = '${repository:raw}'
    )
  )
  AND ('${governance_area:raw}' = 'ALL' OR governance_area = '${governance_area:raw}')
  AND ('${review_priority:raw}' = 'ALL' OR review_priority = '${review_priority:raw}')
  AND ('${actor:raw}' = 'ALL' OR actor = '${actor:raw}')

   ORDER BY CASE review_priority WHEN 'CRITICAL' THEN 1 WHEN 'HIGH' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, event_time DESC
   LIMIT 100

SELECT event_time, governance_event_type, review_priority, governance_area, action,
          actor AS initiated_by, affected_identity, org, repository, review_reason
   FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
   WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) AND (
    '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
    OR org = '${organization:raw}'
    OR EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
      WHERE SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
    )
  )
  AND (
    '${repository:raw}' = 'ALL'
    OR EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
      WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) = '${repository:raw}'
    )
  )
  AND ('${governance_area:raw}' = 'ALL' OR governance_area = '${governance_area:raw}')
  AND ('${review_priority:raw}' = 'ALL' OR review_priority = '${review_priority:raw}')
  AND ('${actor:raw}' = 'ALL' OR actor = '${actor:raw}')

   ORDER BY event_time DESC LIMIT 100

panels.title: Recent Control Changes
panels.description: Latest branch, merge, required-check, and security-control changes.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT event_time, governance_event_type, review_priority, action, actor AS initiated_by,
          org, repository, review_reason
   FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
   WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
     AND governance_area IN ('BRANCH_AND_MERGE_CONTROLS','ADVANCED_SECURITY_POSTURE') AND (
    '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
    OR org = '${organization:raw}'
    OR EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
      WHERE SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
    )
  )
  AND (
    '${repository:raw}' = 'ALL'
    OR EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
      WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) = '${repository:raw}'
    )
  )
  AND ('${governance_area:raw}' = 'ALL' OR governance_area = '${governance_area:raw}')
  AND ('${review_priority:raw}' = 'ALL' OR review_priority = '${review_priority:raw}')
  AND ('${actor:raw}' = 'ALL' OR actor = '${actor:raw}')

   ORDER BY event_time DESC LIMIT 100

list.name: organization
list.label: Organization

query.query:
WITH organizations AS (
  SELECT TRIM(org) AS organization
  FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
  WHERE event_time >= TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 180 DAY)
    AND org IS NOT NULL
    AND TRIM(org) != ''

  UNION DISTINCT

  SELECT SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] AS organization
  FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
  CROSS JOIN UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
  WHERE event_time >= TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 180 DAY)
    AND STRPOS(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/') > 0
)
SELECT organization AS __text, organization AS __value
FROM (
  SELECT 'ALL' AS organization, 0 AS sort_order
  UNION ALL
  SELECT DISTINCT organization, 1 AS sort_order
  FROM organizations
  WHERE organization IS NOT NULL
    AND organization != ''
)
ORDER BY sort_order, organization
LIMIT 5000
query.rawSql:
WITH organizations AS (
  SELECT TRIM(org) AS organization
  FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
  WHERE event_time >= TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 180 DAY)
    AND org IS NOT NULL
    AND TRIM(org) != ''

  UNION DISTINCT

  SELECT SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] AS organization
  FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
  CROSS JOIN UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
  WHERE event_time >= TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 180 DAY)
    AND STRPOS(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/') > 0
)
SELECT organization AS __text, organization AS __value
FROM (
  SELECT 'ALL' AS organization, 0 AS sort_order
  UNION ALL
  SELECT DISTINCT organization, 1 AS sort_order
  FROM organizations
  WHERE organization IS NOT NULL
    AND organization != ''
)
ORDER BY sort_order, organization
LIMIT 5000

LIMIT 5000

list.name: repository
list.label: Repository

query.query:
WITH repositories AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) AS repository_name
  FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
  CROSS JOIN UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
  WHERE event_time >= TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 180 DAY)
    AND TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) != ''
)
SELECT repository_name AS __text, repository_name AS __value
FROM (
  SELECT 'ALL' AS repository_name, 0 AS sort_order
  UNION ALL
  SELECT repository_name, 1 AS sort_order
  FROM repositories
  WHERE '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
     OR SPLIT(repository_name, '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
)
ORDER BY sort_order, repository_name
LIMIT 10000
query.rawSql:
WITH repositories AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) AS repository_name
  FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
  CROSS JOIN UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
  WHERE event_time >= TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 180 DAY)
    AND TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) != ''
)
SELECT repository_name AS __text, repository_name AS __value
FROM (
  SELECT 'ALL' AS repository_name, 0 AS sort_order
  UNION ALL
  SELECT repository_name, 1 AS sort_order
  FROM repositories
  WHERE '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
     OR SPLIT(repository_name, '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
)
ORDER BY sort_order, repository_name
LIMIT 10000

list.name: actor
list.label: Actor

query.query:
SELECT actor_name AS __text, actor_name AS __value
FROM (
  SELECT 'ALL' AS actor_name, 0 AS sort_order

  UNION ALL

  SELECT DISTINCT actor AS actor_name, 1 AS sort_order
  FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
  WHERE event_time >= TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 180 DAY)
    AND actor IS NOT NULL
    AND TRIM(actor) != ''
    AND (
      '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
      OR org = '${organization:raw}'
      OR EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
        WHERE SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)]
              = '${organization:raw}'
      )
    )
    AND (
      '${repository:raw}' = 'ALL'
      OR EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
        WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) = '${repository:raw}'
      )
    )
)
ORDER BY sort_order, actor_name
LIMIT 10000

  FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
  WHERE event_time >= TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 180 DAY)
    AND actor IS NOT NULL
    AND TRIM(actor) != ''
    AND (
      '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
      OR org = '${organization:raw}'
      OR EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
        WHERE SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)]
              = '${organization:raw}'
      )
    )
    AND (
      '${repository:raw}' = 'ALL'
      OR EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
        WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) = '${repository:raw}'
      )
    )
)
ORDER BY sort_order, actor_name
LIMIT 10000

title: GitHub Governance — Repository Drilldown
